summary: Degraded ui.contract(action_open) to a diagnostic contract when an act_window targets a missing model, preventing the previous INTERNAL_ERROR path.

risk.reason: Only the unavailable-model fallback path changed, and it now returns a diagnostic contract instead of bubbling an unhandled exception.

next_step: Replay the original ui.contract(action_open) request in a no-demo-module database and verify the response degrades cleanly.
